recommendations.title: V.I.P.
recommendations.overview: A son to a high-ranked official in North Korea commits a series of murders going across the countries around the world. The movie depicts the following events as South Korea, North Korea and Interpol start chasing down after him.

recommendations.title: Joint Security Area

recommendations.title: The Propaganda Game

recommendations.title: Confidential Assignment
recommendations.overview: When a crime organization from North Korea crosses borders and enters South Korean soil, a South Korean detective must cooperate with a North Korean detective to investigate their whereabouts.

recommendations.title: Outrage Coda

recommendations.title: Take Point

recommendations.title: The Mole: Undercover in North Korea
recommendations.overview: A real-life undercover thriller about two ordinary men who embark on an outrageously dangerous ten-year mission to penetrate the world's most secretive and brutal dictatorship: North Korea.

recommendations.title: Behind Enemy Lines II: Axis of Evil
recommendations.overview: Navy SEALS, headed by Lt. Bobby James, are dispatched to North Korea on a covert mission, all in an effort to take out a missile site...
